title: muhlenbergia commutata
intro: Muhlenbergia commutata, also known as Switch Grass or Blue Wildrye, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia commutata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Muhlenbergia commutata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
